seo.title: Customers — Home Care, Senior Living and Clinical Teams | Able Care
seo.description: See how home care agencies, senior living communities and clinical teams use Able Assess for objective, standardized falls risk screening.

blocks.backgroundImageAlt: Patient celebrating progress during assessment session
blocks.headline: Trusted by care teams who refuse to guess.
blocks.subtitle: From single-site home care agencies to multi-site senior living portfolios, organizations choose Able Assess because it delivers objective data their teams can act on.

cards.title: Home care agencies
cards.body: PE-backed, franchised and independent home care operators use Able Assess to standardize falls risk screening across every branch. Non-clinical staff run the workflow in under five minutes, feeding objective data into HHVBP reporting and care plans.

cards.title: Senior living communities
cards.body: CCRCs, rental retirement, independent living and assisted living operators use Able Assess to screen residents objectively, reduce falls-related turnover and protect occupancy. The same protocol runs at every site with minimal training.

cards.title: Clinicians and researchers
cards.body: Physiotherapists, geriatricians, occupational therapists and clinical trial teams use Able Assess for multifactorial, peer-reviewed falls risk screening. Remote-capable for decentralized trials, with strong signal for GLP-1 monitoring and oncology endpoints.

items.title: Objective
items.body: Four peer-reviewed measurements captured by the GripAble sensor and the Able Assess workflow. Replaces subjective paper scoring.

items.title: Standardized
items.body: One protocol across every branch, community or clinical site. Defensible to payers, regulators, franchisees and corporate.

items.title: Fast
items.body: Under five minutes per screening. Usable by non-clinical staff with minimal training.

items.title: Defensible
items.body: Backed by peer-reviewed evidence, FDA listing, CE mark, ISO 27001, GDPR and NICE 2025 alignment.

blocks.heading: Ready to see what they saw?
blocks.bodyText: Book a 30-minute demo with the Able Care clinical team. Segment-tailored. See the workflow. Get your questions answered.
